---
title: "Publications"
title-block-banner: true
listing:
  - id: articles
    contents: "publications/articles/**.qmd"
    template: ./ejs/article.ejs
    categories: true
    sort:
      - "year desc"
      - "title"
    sort-ui: [title,author,publication,year]
    filter-ui: [title,author,publication,year]
    page-size: 30
    field-display-names: 
      publication: "Publication"
      year: "Year"
---

# Papers

Browse by topic using the **category buttons** below — click any organism or research theme to filter the list (click it again, or **All**, to reset). You can also sort and search by title or author.

*see also*: [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=aAoYWVUAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate)

::: {#articles}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
// Move the listing category block out of the right margin into a prominent
// filter bar directly above the paper list (Publications page only).
(function () {
  function relocate() {
    if (document.querySelector(".category-filter-bar")) return;
    var listing = document.getElementById("listing-articles");
    var cloud = document.querySelector("#quarto-margin-sidebar .quarto-listing-category");
    if (!listing || !cloud) return;
    var title = document.querySelector("#quarto-margin-sidebar .quarto-listing-category-title");
    var bar = document.createElement("div");
    bar.className = "category-filter-bar";
    if (title) bar.appendChild(title);
    bar.appendChild(cloud); // move (not clone) to preserve Quarto's click handlers
    listing.parentNode.insertBefore(bar, listing);
  }
  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", relocate);
  } else {
    relocate();
  }
})();
</script>
```


# Book Chapters

Moreira Sanmartín R, Roberts SB, Figueras A. (2016) [Molluscs. pages 223-245, in Genomics in Aquaculture](http://www.sciencedirect.com/science/book/9780128014189). Editors: Simon A. MacKenzie and Sissel Jentoft. ISBN: 978-0-12-801418-9

Gavery, M., & Roberts, S. (2018). [Genetics & Epigenetics in Life History and Reproduction: Oysters](http://dx.doi.org/10.1016/B978-0-12-809633-8.20621-3). In M. K. Skinner (Ed.), Encyclopedia of Reproduction. vol. 6, pp. 736--742. Academic Press: Elsevier. doi: 10.1016/B978-0-12-809633-8.20621-3 [pdf](http://eagle.fish.washington.edu/whale/pub/C20621.pdf)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Theses

Causes of Infection and Disease Progression of *Hematodinium sp*. in the Tanner crab, *Chionoecetes bairdi.* Aspen Coyle 2024. <https://hdl.handle.net/1773/52794>

Developing Tools and Resources for Maturation Control in Bivalvia. Olivia Cattau. 2023 <http://hdl.handle.net/1773/50826>

Patterns, dynamics, and potential roles of DNA methylation in reef corals and their allies. James Dimond. 2019 <http://hdl.handle.net/1773/44815>

Response of Olympia oysters (*Ostrea lurida*) to changing environmental conditions. Jake Heare. 2015 <http://hdl.handle.net/1773/35206>

Genomic signatures of natural selection and population structure in West Coast and Alaskan sablefish (*Anoplopoma fimbria*). Andrew Jasonowicz. 2014 <http://hdl.handle.net/1773/33907>

DNA methylation variation in gametes and larvae of the Pacific oyster, *Crassostrea gigas*. Claire Ellis Olson. 2014 <http://hdl.handle.net/1773/27478>

Epigenomic and transcriptomic regulation of environmental responses in the Pacific oyster, *Crassostrea gigas*. Mackenzie Gavery. 2014. <http://hdl.handle.net/1773/25984>

The Effects of Ocean Acidification on Multiple Life History Stages of the Pacific Oyster, *Crassostrea gigas*: Implications for Physiological Trade-offs. Emma Timmins-Schiffman. 2014. <http://hdl.handle.net/1773/25413>

Sablefish (*Anoplopoma fimbria*) sperm: The physiology of activation and the development of a cryopreservation protocol. Doug Immerman. 2014. <http://hdl.handle.net/1773/25414>

Genetic and phenotypic diversity in sockeye salmon, <em>Oncorhynchus nerka</em>. Caroline Storer. 2012. figshare. <a href="http://dx.doi.org/10.6084/m9.figshare.661720"> http://dx.doi.org/10.6084/m9.figshare.661720</a>

Characterizing the effects of ocean acidification in larval and juvenile Manila clam, <em>Ruditapes philippinarum</em>, using a transcriptomic approach. David Metzger. 2012 <a href="http://fish.washington.edu/research/publications/ms_phd/Metzger_D_MS_Sp12.pdf"> download</a>

------------------------------------------------------------------------


# Recent Presentations

#### 2026

-   [Sparse Tensor Decomposition and Elastic Net Regression for Multi-Species Gene Expression Analysis](https://github.com/sr320/talk-escience-2026) University of Washington eScience Institute Seminar Series. Seattle, WA. March 2026. Steven Roberts & Kathleen Durkin.

-   [Environmental Memory: The Missing State Variable in Marine Biology](https://github.com/sr320/talk-UNCW-2026) UNCW Biology Seminar Series. Wilmington, NC. March 2026. Steven Roberts.

-   [Shellfish Environmental Memory — Beyond Epigenetics](https://github.com/sr320/talk-EpiAqua-2026) EpiAqua 2026 - January 2026, University of Concepcion, Chile. Steven Roberts.

#### 2025

-   [Diverse nutritional strategies mediate early life thermal responses in reef-building corals in Moorea](https://github.com/AHuffmyer/presentations/blob/master/2025/Huffmyer_MCR_AIM_2025.pdf). Ariana S. Huffmyer. Moorea Coral Reef Long Term Ecological Research All-Investigators Meeting. Virtual. December 12, 2025.

-   [Stress hardening and metabolic screening: Tools to assess oyster performance and resilience](https://github.com/AHuffmyer/presentations/blob/master/2025/Huffmyer_PCSGA_2025.pdf). Ariana S. Huffmyer. Pacific Coast Shellfish Growers Association Conference 2025. Vancouver, WA. September 10, 2025.

-   [Developing an integrated approach for multiomic epigenetic analyses](https://github.com/shedurkin/Roberts-LabNotebook/blob/master/presentations/Durkin_Session5_EPIMAR_2025.pptx). Kathleen Durkin. Epigenetics in Marine and Aquatic Research 2025. Barcelona, Spain. May, 2025.

-   [STRUCTURAL GENOMIC VARIATION IN TRIPLOID PACIFIC OYSTERS: Insight into differential physiology?](https://github.com/sr320/talk-AA-2025) Aquaculture 2025. New Orleans, LA. March 10, 2025.

-   [Shellfish environmental memory: Implications and opportunities](https://github.com/sr320/talk-WSG-2025). Washington SeaGrant Shellfish Growers Meeting.

-   [IMPROVING OYSTER AQUACULTURE WITH RESILIENCE BIOMARKERS FROM OMICS META-ANALYSIS](https://github.com/Resilience-Biomarkers-for-Aquaculture/Resilience-Biomarkers-for-Aquaculture.github.io/blob/master/docs/AQ_2025/20250310_AQ25_SAW.pptx). Shelly Wanamaker. Aquaculture 2025. New Orleans, LA. March 10, 2025.

-   [Parental Priming for Ocean Acidification Resilience in Manila Clams: Mechanistic Insights Gained Through Egg Transcriptome Analysis](https://meganewing.github.io/mewing-notebook/posts/2025-03/Aquaculture25_presentation.html). Megan Ewing. Aquaculture 2025. New Orleans, LA. March 10, 2025.

-   [Molecular mechanisms of heatwave mortality in Pacific cod early life stages](https://github.com/RobertsLab/project-cod-temperature/blob/main/reports/Spencer%2CLH_Poster-AMSS-2025-final.pdf). Laura Spencer. Alaska Marine Science Symposium. Anchorage, AK. January 2025.

-   [Exploring functional roles of non-coding RNA in stony corals](https://github.com/shedurkin/Roberts-LabNotebook/blob/master/presentations/Durkin_SICB_2025.pptx). Kathleen Durkin. Society of Integrative and Comparative Biology. Atlanta, GA. January, 2025

#### 2024

-   [Molecular indicators of performance in Pacific cod exposed to climate stressors](https://github.com/RobertsLab/project-cod-temperature/blob/main/reports/Groundfish%20Seminar%2C%202024.pdf). Laura Spencer. NOAA AFSC Groundfish Seminar. Seattle, WA. December 2024.

-   [Molecular indicators of performance in a marine fish exposed to temperature stress](https://github.com/RobertsLab/project-cod-temperature/blob/main/reports/Manchester-Presentation-Dec2024.pdf). Laura Spencer. NOAA NWFSC Manchester Research Station. Manchester, WA. December 2024.

-   [Comparing sea star species with varying susceptibility to sea star wasting disease](https://github.com/grace-ac/presentations/blob/main/2024/Crandall_WSN_2024.pptx). Grace Crandall. Western Society of Naturalists. Portland, OR. November 2024.

-   [Marine invertebrate environmental memory: Implications, mechanisms, and opportunities.](https://github.com/sr320/talk-SZAN-2024) Steven Roberts. Stazione Zoologica Anton Dohrn, Naples, Italy. October 2024.

-   [Olympia Oyster (*Ostrea lurida*) Restoration in the United States A Physiology and Genomic Perspective](https://github.com/sr320/talk-ostras-2024). Steven Roberts. Concepcion, Chile. July 2024.

-   [Marine invertebrate environmental memory: Implications, mechanisms, and opportunities](https://github.com/sr320/talk-duke-2024). Steven Roberts. Duke Marine Laboratory, Beaufort, NC. February 2024.

-   [*Pycnopodia helianthoides* immune response to Sea Star Wasting Disease](https://github.com/grace-ac/presentations/blob/main/2024/Crandall_SICB_2024.pdf). Grace Crandall. Society of Integrative and Comparative Biology. January 2024.

-   [Thermal stress reduces photosynthate metabolism and disrupts nitrogen cycling in coral larvae](https://github.com/AHuffmyer/presentations/blob/master/2024/Huffmyer_SICB_2024.pdf). Ariana S. Huffmyer. Society of Integrative and Comparative Biology. January 2024.

-   [Biodiversity Survey Methods: Using eDNA Metabarcoding to Complement Existing Methods](https://github.com/ChrisMantegna/YellowIsland2023/blob/main/Mantegna_eDNA_presentation.pdf). Chris Mantegna. Society of Integrative and Comparative Biology. January 2024.

-   [Comparative analyses of long non-coding RNA activity in three coral species](https://github.com/zbengt/zbengt.github.io/blob/master/assets/SICB_Comparative%20analyses%20of%20%20long%20non-coding%20RNA%20activity%20in%20%20coral%20species.pdf). Zachary Bengtsson. Society of Integrative and Comparative Biology. January 2024.
